metadata.description: Skills + Subagents for Claude Code - Progressive skills for quick wins, orchestrated agents for full agentic coding

plugins.name: skills-md
plugins.description: Language and framework-specific rules — Ruby, Python, React, Node.js, Docker, and more. Complements the dev/qa plugins with technology-specific coding standards.

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Skills + Subagents for development — web, mobile, and integrations. Recipes for backend, frontend, and full-stack agentic coding.

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: Skills + Subagents for QA — web, mobile, and integration testing. Recipes for acceptance tests, E2E test generation, and browser-layer review.

plugins.name: env-guard
plugins.description: Prevents Claude Code from reading or leaking sensitive files — .env, credentials, SSH keys — via hook enforcement and behavioral guidance

plugins.name: metronome
plugins.description: Detects shortcut-taking behavior and guides Claude to follow procedures step by step

plugins.name: discover
plugins.description: Turns feature ideas into evidence-backed PRDs through structured discovery, 4 Risks assessment, and validation workflows

plugins.name: caveman
plugins.description: A Claude Code skill/plugin and Codex plugin that makes agent talk like caveman — cutting ~75% of output tokens while keeping full technical accuracy.

plugins.name: claude-attribution
plugins.description: Appends '🤖 Written by Claude, reviewed by <user>' attribution to all external posts via any MCP-connected platform

plugins.name: markdown-format
plugins.description: Auto-formats .md files after Claude writes or edits them using markdownlint-cli2 --fix — silently corrects LLM-generated markdown errors
